customSlashCommands.name: researcher-agent
customSlashCommands.description: Deep Research Orchestrator — breaks scope into subtasks, generates prompt chains, executes research, synthesises findings

customSlashCommands.name: dc-operator-research-agent
customSlashCommands.description: DC Operator Research Agent — researches Norwegian data center operators and produces meeting briefs

customSlashCommands.name: create-prompts
customSlashCommands.description: Socratic Prompt Chain Generator — creates structured prompt chains for research subtasks

customSlashCommands.name: decompose-task
customSlashCommands.description: Task Decomposition Skill — breaks complex tasks into structured subtasks

customSlashCommands.name: run-prompt-chain
customSlashCommands.description: Prompt Chain Executor — runs prompt chains with parallel/sequential execution via sub-agents

customSlashCommands.name: save-research
customSlashCommands.description: Research Output Saver — saves research outputs to local workspace and Notion

customSlashCommands.name: select-diagram
customSlashCommands.description: Diagram Selector & Generator — creates Mermaid diagrams and interactive HTML visualisations

customSlashCommands.name: synthesise-research
customSlashCommands.description: Research Synthesis Engine — synthesises all subtask research into a unified answer

customSlashCommands.name: write-specs
customSlashCommands.description: Spec-Driven Development Interview — generates specifications through structured interviews
